author: doll-agent
content: Added HasFeatureImportances impl + cached feature_importances field to all 4 missing fitted estimators: FittedAdaBoostClassifier, FittedAdaBoostRegressor, FittedBaggingClassifier, FittedBaggingRegressor. Shared aggregator decision_tree::aggregate_tree_importances() handles per-tree feature-index remapping (Bagging) and per-tree weighting (AdaBoost). Returns normalized importances summing to 1.0. Skipped IsolationForest, RandomTreesEmbedding, VotingClassifier/Regressor — sklearn does not define feature_importances_ for any of these. All 343 tests pass.
